items.text: After redoply, the claude session enter resume window and unable to auto recover from it.

comments.text: It is after reployment, the old session unable to recover from the resume window and need manual intervention to continue

items.text: the file explorer doesnt occupy the entire screen when enabled on mobile.
refresh the architecture md with the latest information and implementation

comments.text: automatically update architecture and refresh arch tab window

items.text: stop switching to the readonly viewer automatically, make the chat pane the main working window
make the scroll bar the same color as the surrounding components
ensure the session is in auto mode when is request is sent to claude

keep seeing "claude09:05 AM
No response requested.", investigate why it's happening on mycobeta

comments.text: it's also showing the following: (Claude ran 1 tool call and didn't post a text reply.) from time to time

items.text: make responses requires user input a pop up blocking pane any questions will be responded in the right order as they came in

comments.text: the response is referring to the clause session output which requires user interaction.  the pop pane disappears once all required responses are submitted.

items.text: ensure it works with gitee, allow saving tokens for gitee
when generate a plan, it display twice, one in the main window and on in discussion window, should only display in one place, maybe fold the one in main window
for selection question, there are options such as "chat about it", "type something", it will require typing a message and hit submit.
when generate a plan, it display twice, one in the main window and on in discussion window, should only display in one place, maybe fold the one in main window
when the app is inactive but the claude session might be still running in the background, when the app become active again, it wont pick up the new output from pty while the app is inactive

comments.text: Maybe add a timestamp and process everythinv that was new since then

items.text: The questions asking for permisson in chat panel doesnt have the context. It  only ask yes/no like the following but no info on yes/no to what.

the following output is broadcased to chat pane as a selection: "● 5ed1552 is committed locally. This is a meaningfully bigger UX change than the
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 ☐ Deploy plan 

Ship 5ed1552 (chat routing rewrite) the same way as before?

❯ 1. Deploy to mycobeta + push
     Same flow as 5ed1552's predecessors: git archive HEAD → scp → ssh extract →
      ssh deploy.sh on mycobeta, run ./test.sh there, then git push origin main.
      Local mycod stays on the OLD code until someone restarts it (would kill
     this Claude session).
  2. Push only, deploy later
     git push origin main now so the commit is on GitHub, but skip the mycobeta
     deploy. Useful if you want to eyeball the diff on the GitHub UI first.
  3. Hold both
     Leave 5ed1552 local. You can roll back with git reset --soft HEAD~1 if you
     want to amend before publishing.
  4. Type something.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  5. Chat about this" instead I am seeing "claude07:58 AM
↪ Superseded by a newer dialog"

comments.text: another case the menu selection is not broadcasted to chat pane: ● The Refresh button today fires fast (~1s for re-extracting   from JSONL). Adding LLM-based dedupe adds 10–30s round-trip   to claude -p. Three integration shapes — UX trade-offs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  ☐ Integration   How should plan-refresh integrate the dedupe scan?  ❯ 1. Background, inline callout      Refresh returns immediately as today. The server kicks off       the LLM dedupe in the background; when it returns       (10–30s), a state-update frame delivers proposals and the      plan view renders a 'Possible merges' callout at the top      with `Apply` / `Dismiss` buttons per group. Best UX — no      blocking, user confirms inline.   2. Sequential, blocking refresh      Refresh waits for both the re-extraction AND the dedupe      LLM call before returning. Button reads 'Refreshing…      (asking claude for merges)'. User clicks `Apply`/`Dismiss`       in the plan view once

items.text:
the order of the message and question that are related are broadcasted in wrong order in chat pane: "claude08:07 AM
✓ Picked [2] Yes, and don’t ask again for: git *
claude08:08 AM
✓ Picked [2] Discard local changes
claude08:08 AM
The pull is blocked because _myco_/plan.json has local changes that would be overwritten. How would you like to handle it?"
/clear cmd clear the message in memory in the chat pane only, a refresh of the site picks up everything again.

the main window load all history at once, which cause performance problem on mobile device. Need to optimze to only load the recent history need to current window and trigger loading of history when user scroll the window up.

The todo window will get disappeared when there is a new message update in main window, which is unexpected. should add an icon for main window on top-right, so only return back to main window when user choose to.
lazy-load chat history on scroll-up instead of loading the full transcript at once (mobile perf)
add a top-right 'return to main' icon so the Todo window doesn't auto-vanish on new main-window messages
rename the 'claude' author label to 'myco' in chat rows (e.g. resolved menu picks)
fix white status-bar background on readonly viewer and chat pane to match surroundings
stop duplicate plan rendering across main window and discussion pane (fold one)
add typing+submit handling for menu options like 'chat about it' / 'type something'
include context (yes/no to what) in permission prompts shown in chat pane
fix plan-selection rows that render '↪ Superseded by a newer dialog' instead of the options
add pop-up blocking pane for queued user-input-required responses, ordered by arrival
stop auto-switching to readonly viewer; keep chat pane as the main working window
make file explorer fill the entire screen when enabled on mobile
match scroll bar color with surrounding components
deploy commit 5c8a04f (menu-pick queue + retry) to mycobeta
investigate recurring 'No response requested' / 'ran 1 tool call no text reply' on mycobeta
ensure session is in auto mode when a request is sent to claude
auto-recover claude session from the resume window after redeploy (no manual intervention)
make /clear wipe persisted history server-side, not just in-memory (refresh restores it today)
auto-persist architecture to architecture.md and auto-load on tab open (no refresh button)
render the same session independently across mobile, browser, and vscode clients
decide where the 'myserver' host from the vscode-remote share URL is stored/configured
stop passing auth tokens via WebSocket URL query strings; use a subprotocol or first-message handshake
support gitee and allow saving gitee tokens
The window in discussion panel ask for use decision is embeded in chat window, user may not see it and continue input more message. Should  switch to use a model dialog to force use make the decision
add priority and importance score (h/m/l) to todos in the plan, and sorted by score(p)+score(i)
each fr, td, bug should have an id in the format of fr-<id>, td-<id>, bug-<id>, automatically merge similar or related todos using LLM with a label merged with info of which todo/bug/fr is merged,

support "type something" or "chat about it" in menus like the following: "🤔 Claude is waiting on a decision

Scope the auto-merge piece — when should the LLM run?

[1] Background, fire-and-forget
[2] On-demand /dedupe
[3] Synchronous on add
[4] Type something.
[5] Chat about this
Pick here — goes straight to the session, no chat post."

allow spawn subagents for each feature request, todo, or bug fix, support viewing conversation/logs of individual feature request, todo and bug fix. all questions requires user confirmation will pop up in the main window.
